result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text - text
LINE 1: ...T c.ownerid, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.create...
                                                             ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: SELECT c.ownerid, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate))) AS avg_seconds, COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM "Case" c
LEFT JOIN casehistory__c ch ON ch.caseid__c = c.id AND ch.field__c = 'OwnerId'
WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND c.closeddate >= '2023-05-02'
  AND c.closeddate <= '2023-09-02'
GROUP BY c.ownerid
HAVING COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.id IS NOT NULL) <= 1 AND COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_seconds ASC
LIMIT 10;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
SELECT c.ownerid, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate))) AS avg_seconds, COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM "Case" c
LEFT JOIN casehistory__c ch ON ch.caseid__c = c.id AND ch.field__c = 'OwnerId'
WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND c.closeddate >= '2023-05-02'
  AND c.closeddate <= '2023-09-02'
GROUP BY c.ownerid
HAVING COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.id IS NOT NULL) <= 1 AND COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_seconds ASC
LIMIT 10;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT c.ownerid, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate))) AS avg_seconds, COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM "Case" c
LEFT JOIN casehistory__c ch ON ch.caseid__c = c.id AND ch.field__c = 'OwnerId'
WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND c.closeddate >= '2023-05-02'
  AND c.closeddate <= '2023-09-02'
GROUP BY c.ownerid
HAVING COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.id IS NOT NULL) <= 1 AND COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_seconds ASC
LIMIT 10;

args.query:
WITH cases AS (
  SELECT id, ownerid, createddate::timestamp AS created_ts, closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND closeddate::timestamp >= '2023-05-02'::timestamp
    AND closeddate::timestamp <= '2023-09-02'::timestamp
),
owner_events AS (
  SELECT caseid__c AS caseid, trim(newvalue__c) AS owner FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c='OwnerId' AND newvalue__c IS NOT NULL AND trim(newvalue__c) <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT caseid__c AS caseid, trim(oldvalue__c) AS owner FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c='OwnerId' AND oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL AND trim(oldvalue__c) <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT id AS caseid, trim(ownerid) AS owner FROM cases
),
case_owners AS (
  SELECT caseid, owners, cardinality(owners) AS owner_count
  FROM (
    SELECT caseid, array_agg(DISTINCT owner) FILTER (WHERE owner IS NOT NULL) AS owners
    FROM owner_events
    GROUP BY caseid
  ) t
),
case_metrics AS (
  SELECT c.id AS caseid, COALESCE(co.owners, array[]::text[]) AS owners, co.owner_count,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closed_ts - c.created_ts)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM cases c
  LEFT JOIN case_owners co ON co.caseid = c.id
),
agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT owner AS agentid, COUNT(DISTINCT caseid) AS cases_handled
  FROM owner_events
  GROUP BY owner
),
sole_case_assignments AS (
  SELECT caseid, owners[1] AS sole_owner, handle_seconds
  FROM case_metrics
  WHERE owner_count = 1
)
SELECT sca.sole_owner AS agentid, AVG(sca.handle_seconds) AS avg_sec, ac.cases_handled
FROM sole_case_assignments sca
JOIN agent_case_counts ac ON ac.agentid = sca.sole_owner
WHERE ac.cases_handled > 1
GROUP BY sca.sole_owner, ac.cases_handled
ORDER BY avg_sec ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH cases AS (
  SELECT id, ownerid, createddate::timestamp AS created_ts, closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND closeddate::timestamp >= '2023-05-02'::timestamp
    AND closeddate::timestamp <= '2023-09-02'::timestamp
),
owner_events AS (
  SELECT caseid__c AS caseid, trim(newvalue__c) AS owner FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c='OwnerId' AND newvalue__c IS NOT NULL AND trim(newvalue__c) <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT caseid__c AS caseid, trim(oldvalue__c) AS owner FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c='OwnerId' AND oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL AND trim(oldvalue__c) <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT id AS caseid, trim(ownerid) AS owner FROM cases
),
case_owners AS (
  SELECT caseid, owners, cardinality(owners) AS owner_count
  FROM (
    SELECT caseid, array_agg(DISTINCT owner) FILTER (WHERE owner IS NOT NULL) AS owners
    FROM owner_events
    GROUP BY caseid
  ) t
),
case_metrics AS (
  SELECT c.id AS caseid, COALESCE(co.owners, array[]::text[]) AS owners, co.owner_count,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closed_ts - c.created_ts)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM cases c
  LEFT JOIN case_owners co ON co.caseid = c.id
),
agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT owner AS agentid, COUNT(DISTINCT caseid) AS cases_handled
  FROM owner_events
  GROUP BY owner
),
sole_case_assignments AS (
  SELECT caseid, owners[1] AS sole_owner, handle_seconds
  FROM case_metrics
  WHERE owner_count = 1
)
SELECT sca.sole_owner AS agentid, AVG(sca.handle_seconds) AS avg_sec, ac.cases_handled
FROM sole_case_assignments sca
JOIN agent_case_counts ac ON ac.agentid = sca.sole_owner
WHERE ac.cases_handled > 1
GROUP BY sca.sole_owner, ac.cases_handled
ORDER BY avg_sec ASC
LIMIT 1;
